Happy Mother's Day, Maa!

✨

Aapka pyaar aur daant hai jiske liye mai kaam kar raha hoon. Aapne jo sabr, care, aur strength dikhayi hai, uska koi muqabla nahi.

Har choti baat, har advice, aur har mamta bhari muskurahat se aapne mujhe humesha khush rakha.

Thank you so much for being our constant source of comfort. Aapka unconditional love hi hai jo mujhe har mushkil se ladne ki taqat deta hai. You don't just deserve to be celebrated today, but every single day of the year.

I LOVE YOU MAA 💖
🌹 💐 🌹
